response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior role — a severe seniority mismatch that typically results in flight risk, compensation misalignment, and disengagement. Java is listed but not a primary stack; main expertise is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. German is only basic, while the role requires strong German for insurance-sector client work.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background including some Java exposure
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, agile)
Proven ability to architect and deliver complex systems
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level junior position
German proficiency is only basic — role requires strong German
Java is peripheral; primary stacks are TS/Node and DLang
